subject: Mareanie, a purple spiny starfish-like sea creature in a colorful underwater scene
description: A purple, spiny starfish-like creature is depicted in an underwater environment rendered in vibrant, almost psychedelic blues, purples, and teals. The figure has a rounded central body with numerous spiny tentacles radiating outward, small eyes, and a pale underside. The background is awash in colorful underwater hues with wavy shapes suggesting coral or anemones. The overall visual is saturated and swirling, giving the scene a vivid, slightly disorienting quality.
foreground: purple spiny starfish-like creature with radiating tentacles
background: colorful vivid underwater environment with coral shapes
